# None

**Summary**: The specific sedimentary unit being studied for its source rock potential.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-ghazwani|Ghazwani, 2012]] studied the Hanadir member formation.

- [[2013-nooruddin|Nooruddin, 2013]] Not stated in source

- [[2013-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2013]] N/A

- [[2013-khan|Khan, 2013]] not applicable

- [[2014-kasha|Kasha, 2014]] N/A

- [[2015-adebayo|Adebayo, 2015]] not applicable

- [[2014-shakeel|SHAKEEL, 2014]] N/A

- [[2015-fuad|Fuad, 2015]] conducted research in the Teapot basin, Wyoming.

- [[2015-rammay|RAMMAY, 2015]] used a model based on the Barnett Shale to validate the simulation methodology.

- [[2016-adam|ADAM, 2016]] not applicable

- [[2017-amao|Amao, 2017]] None.

- [[2019-al-nutaifi|Al-Nutaifi, 2019]] analyzed the carbonate gas reservoir to evaluate fracture impacts.

- [[2021-alqam|ALQAM, 2021]] N/A

- [[2022-samarkin|Samarkin, 2022]] N/A

- [[2022-kalam|Kalam, 2022]] analyzed the mineralogy of Saudi dolomite samples.

- [[2023-abdulwahab|Abdulwahab, 2023]] conducted experiments on three specific rock types to validate the dielectric model.

- [[2023-desouky|Desouky, 2023]] used Austin Chalk samples to model the behavior of soft carbonates.

- [[2024-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2024]] used Indiana Limestone to evaluate the impact of organic acid on wettibility.

- [[2024-muhammed|Muhammed, 2024]] studied hydrogen storage in depleted gas reservoirs, with a focus on the general applicability to fields like those in Saudi Arabia.

- [[2024-badhafere|BADHAFERE, 2024]] not applicable

## Diagenetic History

- [[2012-ghazwani|Ghazwani, 2012]] Affected by igneous intrusion and thermal cracking.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- A localized igneous intrusion was encountered within Hanir shale at Well-C, causing rapid thermal cracking of organic matter. ([[2012-ghazwani|Ghazwani, 2012, p. 156]])

- Not stated in source ([[2013-nooruddin|Nooruddin, 2013]])

- N/A ([[2013-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2013]])

- Not stated in source ([[2013-khan|Khan, 2013]])

- N/A ([[2014-kasha|Kasha, 2014]])

- Not stated in source ([[2015-adebayo|Adebayo, 2015]])

- N/A ([[2014-shakeel|SHAKEEL, 2014]])

- The study focused on the Frontier and Tensleep formations within this region. ([[2015-fuad|Fuad, 2015, p. 24]])

- Data from the Barnett Shale was used to perform history matching of the simulation model. ([[2015-rammay|RAMMAY, 2015, p. 53]])

- not applicable ([[2016-adam|ADAM, 2016]])

- N/A ([[2017-amao|Amao, 2017]])

- Not stated in source ([[2019-al-nutaifi|Al-Nutaifi, 2019]])

- N/A ([[2021-alqam|ALQAM, 2021]])

- N/A ([[2022-samarkin|Samarkin, 2022]])

- Lidam Sample 1 is pure dolomite (100%). ([[2022-kalam|Kalam, 2022, p. 124]])

- Berea (BS), Fontainebleau (FB), and Indiana (IL) were used as representative models for different mineralogical compositions. ([[2023-abdulwahab|Abdulwahab, 2023, p. 107]])

- Austin Chalk showed significant improvement in stiffness and conductivity after DAP treatment. ([[2023-desouky|Desouky, 2023, p. 53]])

- Carbonate rocks were more affected by wettibility alteration than sandstone. ([[2024-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2024, p. 58]])

- Not stated in source ([[2024-muhammed|Muhammed, 2024]])

- Not stated in source ([[2024-badhafere|BADHAFERE, 2024]])
